claim_text: A computer implemented method of determining a score for a plurality of linked documents, comprising: obtaining a plurality of linked documents; selecting one of the linked documents; assigning a score to the selected document that is dependent on scores of documents that link to the selected document; and processing the linked documents according to their scores.

elements.element_text: computer implemented method of determining a score for a plurality of linked documents
elements.notes: The invention focuses on a claim mapping platform, not on scoring linked documents.

elements.element_text: obtaining a plurality of linked documents
elements.notes: The invention does not mention obtaining linked documents.

elements.element_text: selecting one of the linked documents
elements.notes: No mention of selecting linked documents in the invention.

elements.element_text: assigning a score to the selected document that is dependent on scores of documents that link to the selected document
elements.notes: The invention does not describe assigning scores to documents.

elements.element_text: processing the linked documents according to their scores
elements.notes: No processing of linked documents is described in the invention.

missing_elements: computer implemented method of determining a score for a plurality of linked documents
obtaining a plurality of linked documents
selecting one of the linked documents
assigning a score to the selected document that is dependent on scores of documents that link to the selected document
processing the linked documents according to their scores
summary: The claim describes a method for scoring linked documents, which does not align with the invention focused on an AI claim mapping platform.
